title: Joy Boy’s Drums Begin to Echo
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Hiyori, Unknown person #5, Orochi, Unknown person #6, Momonosuke as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whooa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's no end to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Hiyori
dialogue.text: Kawamatsu- San, the ceiling is coming down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thousands of our comrades are still in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If only we weren't up in the sky...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's no water around here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't do anything to quell these flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone, please find a way out!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: There is no honor in burning alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kaido- Sama?!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Make that brat, momonosuke, declare his surrender!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: "Straw hat!" Luffy is dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any of you still wish to fight, step forward NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can't be!! Young straw hat couldn't have...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah!! He's done it!! It's a total victory for Kaido-SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Straw Hat-ya's "voice" has...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...vanished!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Looks like we were kidding ourselves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is a bitter pill to swallow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've got nothing left....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WAAA AAAA AAAAAAA AAAHA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Luffy's been killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't go out there- you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We can't let that oversized snake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get away with lying like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Big bro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Luffy can't have lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's not dead!! It's impos- sible!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
